case_title: BALTIMORE ROSLYN VS CAL TRANS CO TYLER PON ATTY GEN OFFICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BALTIMORE ROSLYN AS TO DEFENDANT CAL TRANS CO TYLER PON ATTY GEN OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALTIMORE ROSLYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAL TRANS CO TYLER PON ATTY GEN OFFICE PLTF FAILED TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF.HOWEVER DEFT AGREED IN CT TO PLANT A TREE AROUND PLTF'S STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO TYLER PON RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
